entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop under investigation for combining ability

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of parents to transmit favorable characters to their offspring

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall production of the crop, referred to as yield per se

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: The individual traits that contribute to the overall seed yield

entities.name: P-9624
entities.description: A parent genotype identified as a good combiner for yield and yield characters

entities.name: ICP-71
entities.description: A parent genotype identified as a good combiner for yield and yield characters

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: GCA effects used to analyze additive genetic variance

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: SCA effects used to analyze non-additive genetic variance

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of seeds produced, dependent on pod number and 100-seed weight

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: The number of pods per plant, a component of seed yield

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, a component of seed yield

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical height of the plant

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach the flowering stage

entities.name: PROGENY PERFORMANCE SELECTION
entities.description: A simple breeding procedure involving selection based on the performance of offspring

entities.name: ADDITIVE VARIANCES
entities.description: Genetic variance that can be effectively moped up by simple selection

entities.name: BRANCH NUMBER
entities.description: The number of branches on the plant

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENETIC VARIANCES
entities.description: Genetic variances that predominate in the inheritance of branch number and yield

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected improvement in a trait in the next generation

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used for making improvement in branch number and yield

entities.name: PROGENY TESTING
entities.description: A method of selection used to evolve high yielding lines

relationships.description: used to evolve high yielding lines
used to evolve high yielding lines
